briefdescription.para: Non-correctable error event, requires attention from higher levels or application.

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct uhc_event *const event)
memberdef.name: uhc_event_cb_t

briefdescription.para: Callback to submit UHC event to higher layer.

detaileddescription.para: At the higher level, the event is to be inserted into a message queue.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Point to event structure

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the controller is initialized.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: true if controller is initialized, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the controller is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: true if controller is enabled, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Perform USB bus reset, controller may emit UHC_EVT_RESETED at the end of reset signaling.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: if the controller is already performing a bus operation
Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: if already enabled

detaileddescription.para: Disable SOF generator and emit UHC_EVT_SUSPENDED event when USB bus is suspended.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: if already suspended

detaileddescription.para: Signal resume for at least 20ms, emit UHC_EVT_RESUMED at the end of USB bus resume signaling. The SoF generator should subsequently start within 3ms.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: if the controller is already performing a bus operation

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint8_t ep, struct usb_device *const udev, void *const cb, void *const cb_priv)
memberdef.name: uhc_xfer_alloc

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new transfer from common transfer pool. Transfer has no buffer after allocation, but can be allocated and added from different pools.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Endpoint address
Pointer to USB device
Transfer completion callback
Completion callback callback private data

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated transfer or NULL on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint8_t ep, struct usb_device *const udev, void *const cb, void *const cb_priv, size_t size)
memberdef.name: uhc_xfer_alloc_with_buf

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new transfer from common transfer pool with buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Endpoint address
Pointer to USB device
Transfer completion callback
Completion callback callback private data
Size of the buffer

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated transfer or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Free UHC transfer and any buffers.

detaileddescription.para: Free any buffers and put the transfer back into the transfer pool.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Pointer to UHC transfer

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct uhc_transfer *const xfer, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: uhc_xfer_buf_add

detaileddescription.para: Add a previously allocated buffer to the transfer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Pointer to UHC transfer
Pointer to UHC request buffer

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated request or NULL on error.

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new buffer from common request buffer pool and assign it to the transfer if the xfer parameter is not NULL.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Size of the request buffer

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated request or NULL on error.

detaileddescription.para: Put the buffer back into the request buffer pool.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Pointer to UHC request buffer

detaileddescription.para: Add transfer to the queue. If the queue is empty, the transfer can be claimed by the controller immediately.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Pointer to UHC transfer

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: controller is not initialized

briefdescription.para: Remove a USB host controller transfers from queue.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Pointer to UHC transfer

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: controller is not initialized

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uhc_event_cb_t event_cb, const void *const event_ctx)
memberdef.name: uhc_init

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Event callback from the higher layer (USB host stack)
Opaque pointer to higher layer context

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: on parameter error (no callback is passed)
already initialized

detaileddescription.para: Enable powered USB host controller and allow host stack to recognize and enumerate devices.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: controller is not initialized
already enabled
Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: already disabled

detaileddescription.para: Shut down the controller completely to reduce energy consumption or to change the role of the controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: controller is already uninitialized

detaileddescription.para: Obtain the capabilities of the controller such as high speed (HS), and more.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: USB host controller capabilities.

briefdescription.para: Get pointer to higher layer context.

detaileddescription.para: The address of the context is passed as an argument to the uhc_init() function and is stored in the uhc data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: Opaque pointer to higher layer context

briefdescription.para: Controller is enabled and all API functions are available.
